channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Detroit Red Wings fire coach Derek Lalonde, name Todd McLellan as his replacement
item.description: The Detroit Red Wings fired coach Derek Lalonde on Thursday and named Todd McLellan as his replacement, a major change by general manager Steve Yzerman more than a third of the way through another disappointing season in the place known as “Hockeytown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jim Larrañaga stepping down at Miami, Bill Courtney to take over, AP source says
item.description: CORAL GABLES, Fla. (AP) — Jim Larrañaga is stepping down as Miami’s men’s basketball coach effective immediately, a person with knowledge of the decision said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: US sex-abuse watchdog fires investigator after learning of his arrest for stealing drug money
item.description: The U.S. Center for SafeSport abruptly fired one of its investigators last month after learning he’d been arrested for stealing money confiscated after a drug bust he was part of during his previous job as a police officer.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Simona Halep withdraws from Australian Open qualifying because of knee and shoulder pain
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Two-time Grand Slam champion Simona Halep pulled out of Australian Open qualifying and a tuneup tournament in Auckland, New Zealand, on Thursday because of pain in her knee and shoulder, the latest interruption of her comeback from a drug suspension.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Every team Detroit Lions could face in their first playoff game
item.description: The Detroit Lions don't know their playoff seed just yet, but either way, there are several teams they could end up playing in their first matchup. Here's the full list and how each can happen.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Durant and Beal score 27 points each, Suns beat Nuggets 110-100 to close out Christmas slate
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant and Bradley Beal each scored 27 points and the Phoenix Suns beat the Denver Nuggets 110-100 on Wednesday night in the nightcap to the NBA’s Christmas slate of games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lakers big man Anthony Davis exits Christmas game with sprained left ankle
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — LeBron James and the Lakers delivered once more when big man Anthony Davis went down. Davis didn't return for Los Angeles against Golden State on Wednesday night after spraining his left ankle midway through the first quarter.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jackson breaks Vick's NFL rushing record for QBs in Ravens' rout over Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Baltimore’s Lamar Jackson passed Michael Vick for the most rushing yards by a quarterback in NFL history in a 31-2 victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday. “Michael Vick, one of my favorite players,” Jackson said. “That’s just dope.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Texans look for answers after embarrassing 31-2 home loss to the Ravens
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Quarterback C.J. Stroud summed up Houston’s performance in an embarrassing 31-2 loss to Baltimore on Wednesday. “Sometimes you go out there and lay an egg,” Stroud said. “It’s not easy to say that, but that’s what happened. Didn’t play well from the first play to the last.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens rout Texans on Christmas, inch closer to division title
item.description: The Baltimore Ravens gave the Houston Texans a lump of coal for Christmas and moved up to first place in the AFC North Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Heat list Jimmy Butler as doubtful for Thursday as speculation about his future intensifies
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The Miami Heat are listing Jimmy Butler as doubtful for their game Thursday at Orlando, saying he needs time to recondition before returning to the lineup. Butler did not fly with the team to Orlando on Wednesday night, and his intentions for future games seem a bit unclear as well.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs clinch No. 1 seed, first-round bye in playoffs with dominant win over Steelers
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs clinched the no. 1 seed in the AFC and a first-round bye with their 29-10 win over the Pittsburgh Steelers on Christmas day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Knicks' Mikal Bridges outduels Spurs' Victor Wembanyama; Knicks hold on for narrow victory
item.description: The New York Knicks held on for a 117-114 win over the San Antonio Spurs Christmas Day as Mikal Bridges scored 41 points and outdueled Victor Wembanyama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Victor Wembanyama scores 42 in a memorable Christmas debut but Spurs fall short against the Knicks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Victor Wembanyama nearly obliterated the Spurs' Christmas record book in his first time playing on the holiday. Nearly won the game, too.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Warriors' Steph Curry gets candid about eventual NBA retirement
item.description: During a recent sit-down with ESPN, 36-year-old Golden State Warriors superstar and four-time NBA champion Steph Curry got candid about his life after basketball.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Netflix's NFL Christmas Day coverage experiences miscues
item.description: Some minor technical issues popped up during Netflix's coverage of the Christmas Day matchup between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Pittsburgh Steelers, including one of the game’s graphics briefly displaying an error shortly after kickoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs' Xavier Worthy hit with penalty after touchdown, sparks fan frenzy
item.description: A penalty called on Kansas City Chiefs rookie wide receiver Xavier Worthy after a touchdown during the Christmas Day game against the Pittsburgh Steelers left fans on social media confused.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles Hall of Famer Bill Bergey dies at 79 after lengthy health battle
item.description: On Christmas morning, Bill's son, Jake Bergey, posted the news of his father's passing on social media and described his dad as an "out right great person.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Cal QB Mendoza lands at Indiana in transfer portal: reports
item.description: Mendoza, one of the top quarterbacks available in the transfer portal, will join a team that made the College Football Playoff after a remarkable turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: How name, image and likeness laws have changed college sports
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled in 2021 the NCAA could not prevent student athletes from profiting from their game. Since the decision, legal fights have continued between the NCAA and US states.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah HC drops second straight home game, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - While the Utah Hockey Club has won seven in a row on the game, the team continues to struggle at home. Roope Hintz scored his team-leading 15th goal of the season, and the Dallas Stars held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Winter Classic Recap: Six local teams finish 2-1
item.description: Now that school is out for Christmas break and high school basketball is on a hiatus until early 2025, let's recap a great weekend of hoops across the Grand Valley.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: What to know if you want to follow the Buckeyes to the Rose Bowl
item.description: It will be a warm welcome for Ohio State fans traveling to Pasadena after a frigid December home game at The Shoe.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Beachy, NewsNation

item.title: Matt Petgrave, involved in play that led to Adam Johnson's death, asks for donations for legal costs
item.description: Hockey player Matt Petgrave has called the death of Adam Johnson “a tragic accident” in a public appeal for donations to his legal costs amid a police investigation.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win
item.description: Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs' Mayfield loses key member of offense before his Texas homecoming
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have another difficult road test in their attempt to win the NFC South title.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Flames get goals from 6 players in a 6-4 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jonathan Huberdeau, Connor Zary, Blake Coleman, and Matt Coronato each had a goal and an assist as the Calgary Flames beat the Chicago Blackhawks 6-4 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Texans WR Tank Dell hospitalized after severe knee injury on TD catch vs. Chiefs
item.description: Texans wide receiver Tank Dell was taken to the University of Kansas Medical Center and the team said he would remain overnight after sustaining a severe left knee injury while making a 30-yard touchdown catch in a 27-19 loss to the Chiefs on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws for TD and runs for score as Chiefs beat Texans 27-19 to close in on No. 1 seed
item.description: Patrick Mahomes knew he could run on the ankle he sprained last week. The bigger concern for the Chiefs quarterback was how he would stop, when all the weight and pressure and momentum would land squarely upon it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oakland legend, Hall of Famer Rickey Henderson has died at the age of 65
item.description: (KRON) – Rickey Henderson, one of the greatest baseball players to ever live, died at age 65. Henderson is Major League Baseball’s all-time stolen base leader and is considered by many to be the greatest player in A’s franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Caprock Hockey hangs tough with defending State Champion Durango
item.description: In their second-ever varsity home game, the Caprock Eagles once again had a tough test, this time with the defending 4A State Champion Durango Demons.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: 1 dead in small plane crash near home of NFL player Dion Dawkins
item.description: One person died in a small plane crash Thursday morning close to the house of Buffalo Bills offensive lineman Dion Dawkins, police said.
item.dc:creator: Aidan Joly, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Broncos show growing pains in second-half collapse to Chargers
item.description: In a pivotal Thursday Night, AFC West battle in Los Angeles with plenty of playoff implications, we saw no lack of offense.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz show some fight in 126-119 win over Detroit
item.description: DETROIT (ABC4 Sports) - Collin Sexton scored 30 points, Lauri Markkanen had 27 points and 14 rebounds and the Utah Jazz beat the Detroit Pistons 126-119 on Thursday night for for their second victory in 10 games. Keyonte George added 28 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs' OC Liam Coen addresses NFL head coaching rumors
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers' first-year offensive coordinator Liam Coen has been excellent calling plays for the Bucs this season.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ducks to honor fellow O.C. team at promotional night
item.description: If you're a fan of Orange County sports, you're in luck this January. On Jan. 7, the Anaheim Ducks are hosting Angels Night, an event that includes a baseball jersey giveaway for the first 5,000 fans in attendance. The game against the Calgary Flames begins at 7 p.m. Tickets begin at less than $30.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5
